cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently highlight the quality of benefits and flexible time-off as key positive aspects of their employment.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: The company is recognized for supporting work-life balance through hybrid work options and mental health initiatives.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: While some employees appreciate the variety of professional development opportunities, others feel these are overshadowed by organizational instability.

cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: Many employees report a collaborative and supportive team environment that fosters a sense of belonging.

cluster_summaries.label: Safety & Fairness
cluster_summaries.summary: This area reflects significant tension, as concerns about job security often outweigh the positive interpersonal relationships reported by staff.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees report that high-stress workloads and complicated commission structures often lead to feelings of being underpaid.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: There is frustration regarding slow salary growth and a perceived lack of genuine support for long-term career advancement.

cluster_summaries.label: Disconnected Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees feel isolated or disconnected due to frequent restructuring and perceived leadership changes that do not prioritize employee interests.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Reports of toxic office politics and favoritism suggest that some employees feel the environment lacks fairness and transparency.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: Despite general flexibility, some roles are described as having high pressure and no work-life balance due to constant organizational changes.
